name: Strait of Hormuz Closure - US Military Strikes on Iran
description: US military strikes on Iran tied to Strait of Hormuz closure; Brent surged 60%+ to >$118

name: IMF Stagflation Warning
description: IMF warns Middle East conflict could trigger stagflation; oil >$100/bbl

name: OPEC+ Production Increases Begin
description: 7 major OPEC+ producers began gradual output increases; 206,000 bpd in April and May

name: UAE Exits OPEC+
description: UAE withdrawal from OPEC and OPEC+; production increase adjusted to 188,000 bpd

name: Global Supply Recovery
description: Global supply increased 4.1M bpd to 98.8M bpd in June; still 9.4M bpd below pre-conflict

name: US-Iran Preliminary Agreement
description: Preliminary agreement helped crude prices retreat to ~$74; eased inflation fears

name: US Commercial Crude Drawdown
description: US commercial crude inventories dropped by 380,000 bpd to 4.084M barrels; below 5-year average

name: Saudi Aramco Asia Price Cut
description: Saudi Aramco cut Arab Light OSP by $11/bbl for Asia; reflects intensifying market share competition

name: IEA Demand Downgrade
description: IEA projects 2026 global demand contraction of ~1.1M bpd year-on-year

name: US-Iran Ceasefire Breakdown
description: Trump declared ceasefire 'over'; US resumed airstrikes; Brent jumped ~5% to $78

name: European Energy Price Spike
description: Brent surged ~7% to ~$80; European equities retreated; DAX and CAC 40 dropped >2%

name: IEA Monthly Market Report
description: Report highlights global supply-demand balance and inventory trends

name: Strait of Hormuz Transit Disruption
description: Only 2 oil tankers transited early in day; shipping recovery tentative; insurance costs rising

name: Oil Price Retreat
description: Brent gave back gains, retesting $73.9-76.1 range; market focused on supply fundamentals

name: OPEC+ August Production Increase
description: Production increase of 188,000 bpd continues; fifth consecutive monthly increase
